description: This Java class provides cryptographic helper functions, including password hashing with BCrypt, password verification, and SHA-256 hashing with Base64 encoding, used for secure storage and comparison of sensitive data.

classes.name: CryptoService
classes.description: A service component for cryptographic operations such as password hashing and token hashing.

methods.name: hashPassword
methods.description: Hashes a raw password using BCrypt with a strength of 12.

methods.name: matchesPassword
methods.description: Verifies a raw password against its hashed counterpart.

methods.name: sha256Base64
methods.description: Creates a SHA-256 hash of the input string and encodes it in URL-safe Base64 format without padding.
